name: Key Unlock
description: a metallic click-clunk of a key turning in a lock
usage: Using iron_key / unlocking a door or chest.

ai.prompt: An iron key turning a lock: metallic tumblers clicking, the key scraping, a firm mechanism clunk as it unlocks, weighty and detailed. High-fidelity recorded foley, close-miked, crisp transient, rich body, natural short tail; single isolated sound; dry with only a subtle natural room; no music, no voice, no melody, no chiptune, no synth beeps, no background noise; broadcast-quality, production-ready.
